emails.body: FW: Enron's Proposed Modifications for Parental Guarantee Hey lady, Does the below referenced language work for you? Let me know. Thanks

emails.body: I can agree to 7 business day with a revision to the purposed language int eh second line to read as follows, ... Guarantor shall to apy the Obligations with 7 business days Let me know if this goes?
